ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_provider" TEXT /* Shipping provider used for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_provider FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_provider") REFERENCES shipping_providers ("provider_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_each" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the item */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the shipping provider */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service provided (e.g., express, standard) */,
  "shipping_cost_per_km" REAL /* Cost per kilometer for shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., success, failure, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status update */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the status update is for */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status update was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the status update */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date for the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
